purpose: Resolve the HubCoordinationException ownership split by locking par_323 as schema and creation owner while par_325 appends worker outcomes and retry transitions through a typed handoff.

discipline.responsibility: Create, classify, reopen, and close HubCoordinationException records.
discipline.mustEmitOrConsume: Consume worker outcomes and remain the only creator of canonical exception rows.
